SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-15-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KAYLAH JONES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UPGRADE MOTORS IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S FILED PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF MUST HAVE THE DEFENDANT SERVED WITH A COPY OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM THAT HAS THE NEW COURT DATE STATED ON THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
